checkin.journal:
Considering how much I ate salt yesterday was okeyish, my nose was stuffed and I was having nightmares
Meditation
Packing for hamburg
Breakfast
Flight to Munich was super fast we watched a movie on plane ✈️ - Jungle Cruise was cool
Then lunch in Munich - we ate there got some medicine hehe 😜 
Then flight to Hamburg - watched 3 Simpsons
We arrived to Fontenay hotel
Walkie around lake m, blooming trees, ducks, fresh breeze, amazing connection with nature
It was a nice day, everything went smooth,
